catalog_content:
Item Name: Roxy & Rich Cocoa Butter Tiffany Blue - 8 OZ
Product Description: Coloured Cocoa Butter – Artist Collection This brightly colored cocoa butter will allow you to make highly colorful creations of all sizes! COLOR: TIFFANY BLUE NET WEIGHT: 8 OZ Products from the Artist collection are colored using 100% fat-dispersible colors. Our cocoa butter can be used in a chocolate mold, or airbrushed, painted or applied with fingers directly on molded chocolate. Advantages Available in several attractive colors Easy to use Pre-tempered Edible* * As food safety standards vary from one country to the next, see product description for more information. HOW TO USE COCOA BUTTER? Cocoa butter colouring is sold as a solid. To use it, you must melt it in a boiler or in the microwave. Whatever is easiest for you! Heat the bottle for 10 seconds, shake it, and continue heating for another 10 seconds. Continue until the required amount of cocoa butter has melted. Be careful not to overheat the cocoa butter. Overheating could change the texture, making it impossible to reach expected results or making the cocoa butter unusable.
Value: 8.0
Unit: Fl Oz
overall_summary: Premium artist-grade cocoa butter with vibrant Tiffany Blue color, designed for creative chocolate applications. Pre-tempered and easy-to-use formulation positions it as a high-quality tool for professionals and hobbyists. Packaging and branding suggest a niche, specialty product with a focus on color and versatility.

Item Name: Nacho Cheese Sauce Dipping Cup 3.7 oz. | Microwavable | 10 Count
Bullet Point 1: Rich cheddar cheese flavor is enhanced with juicy tomatoes and spicy jalapenos
Bullet Point 2: Great for pouring over nachos or dipping soft pretzels
Bullet Point 3: Easy-to-remove lid seals in flavor and freshness
Bullet Point 4: After lid is removed, plastic portion cup is microwave safe for quick, easy heating and serving
Product Description: This Muy Fresco 3.7 oz. nacho cheese sauce cup brings a rich cheddar taste elevated with zesty spice to your crispy nachos and other popular snacks. This nacho cheese sauce is made from real cheddar cheese and contains no unwanted flavor additives. Bursting with heat from warm jalapeno peppers and tang from juicy tomatoes, each cup packs a powerful punch to amp up your everyday offerings. The perfect accompaniment to your nachos and soft pretzels, this velvety cheese sauce makes a great addition to your concession stand or convenience store! This nacho cheese sauce is packed in 3.7 oz. portion cups with easy-to-remove lids that seal in flavor and freshness. Each cup is the perfect size for a soft pretzel or serving of nacho chips, and your guests can easily carry them throughout your venue. This nacho cheese cup is also perfect for schools and other institutions looking to regulate and moderate the amount of food being served. Best of all, the plastic container is microwavable. Simply remove the lid prior to microwaving, warm, and serve! Offering portable portions of warm nacho cheese alongside your fan-favorite snacks is an easy way to elevate your guests' dining experience and keep them coming back for more. Increase your transaction time and lessen your kitchen prep time with this convenient and creamy nacho cheese sauce.
Value: 10.0
Unit: Count
overall_summary: Convenience-focused nacho cheese sauce in portable, single-serve plastic cups designed for quick microwave heating and easy serving. Positioned as a mid-range value-add product for foodservice, schools, and retail with no premium or organic claims. Bulk 10-count packaging and microwave-safe design emphasize practicality and portion control.
